parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ sourceChannel: $json.sourceChannel, sourceMessageId: $json.sourceMessageId, userChatId: $json.userChatId, userName: $json.userName, agentId: $json.agentId, messageText: $json.messageText, responseSummary: $json.responseSummary, modelUsed: $json.modelUsed, skillTriggered: $json.skillTriggered, tokensUsed: $json.tokensUsed, responseTimeMs: $json.responseTimeMs, sourceCreatedAt: $json.sourceCreatedAt, metadata: $json.metadata }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ user_chat_id: $json.userChatId || "", user_name: $json.userName || "", agent_id: $json.agentId || "owner", message_text: $json.messageText || "", response_summary: $json.responseSummary || "", model_used: $json.modelUsed || "gpt-5.4", skill_triggered: $json.skillTriggered || "general", tokens_used: $json.tokensUsed || 0, response_time_ms: $json.responseTimeMs || 0, created_at: $json.sourceCreatedAt || new Date().toISOString() }) }}
